scenario.key_phrase: I'm exploring, not ready to decide yet

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hello! Good afternoon. This is Priya from PhysicsWallah sales team. Am I speaking with Arjun? I hope I'm not disturbing you?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Uh, yes this is Arjun. I'm free right now, but I'm not really looking to buy anything immediately.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: No worries at all Arjun! I completely understand. I'm just calling to see if you need any guidance with your studies. Which class are you currently in?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Great! Class 11 is such an important year. Are you preparing for any competitive exams like JEE or NEET? Or focusing mainly on boards?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yeah, I'm thinking about JEE Main. But I'm just exploring options right now, not ready to decide anything yet.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul theek hai! It's smart to explore properly. Since you're in 11th, you have good time - almost 2 years for JEE Main 2027. Are you currently taking any coaching or self-studying?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I'm doing some self-study, but it's getting difficult. That's why I was looking at different platforms online.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Haan, self-study can be challenging without proper guidance. At PW, we have structured courses specifically for JEE 2027. Have you checked our course structure? And just to understand better - what's your budget range for coaching?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Budget is not a huge issue, but I haven't really decided on a specific amount. I need to discuss with my parents first before making any decisions.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: That's very sensible Arjun! Family discussion is important for such decisions. We have courses like JEE Lakshya 2027 at ₹35,999 with complete 2-year guidance, or JEE Arjuna at ₹19,999. Both have EMI options starting ₹1999 per month. Would you like me to share details with you?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Maybe later. I'm still comparing different platforms. There are so many options available, it's confusing.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: I totally understand the confusion! That's why I suggest - take a demo class first. No commitment needed. You can experience our teaching style and then decide. Would you be interested in a free trial? I can arrange it for this weekend.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Hmm, I'm not sure about this weekend. I have some other commitments. Can you call me back next week? I'll have more clarity by then.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Of course Arjun! I'll call you next week. Meanwhile, I'll WhatsApp you our course brochure and demo class links. You can check whenever you're free. What's a good time to call you next week?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Tuesday evening around 6 PM should work. And yes, please send the brochure on WhatsApp. I'll go through it and discuss with my parents.
